title: TaskVault - Secure Task & Password Management
seoTitle: TaskVault - Secure Task & Password Management - Free SaaS Website Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: TaskVault - Secure task and password management for teams
summary: TaskVault - Secure task and password management for teams
description: TaskVault - Secure task and password management for teams
prompt: Build a premium saas website inspired by TaskVault - Secure Task & Password Management. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
TaskVault
Features Security Pricing
Features Security Pricing
Military-Grade Encryption

Your Secrets,
Safely Guarded

Secure task management and password vault for teams. Zero-knowledge architecture means only you can see your data. Trust, verified.

No credit card required • 30-day free trial

Complete Protection Suite

Everything your team needs to stay secure

Password Vault

Generate, store, and auto-fill strong passwords. Securely shared across your team.

Task Management

Organize and track team tasks with encrypted notes and attachments.

Secure Documents

Store sensitive documents with version control and expiring links.

Security Alerts

Get notified of suspicious activity and unauthorized access attempts.

Audit Logs

Complete activity history for compliance and security investigations.

Team Management

Fine-grained permissions and role-based access control for teams.

Bank-Level Security

Your data is protected like your life depends on it

End-to-End Encryption

AES-256 encryption. Your passwords are encrypted on your device before leaving.

Zero-Knowledge

We can't access your data even if we wanted to. Only you hold the keys.

Verified & Audited

Independently audited. SOC 2 Type II certified. GDPR compliant.

Certifications

  • Military-grade AES-256 encryption
  • TLS 1.3 for all data in transit
  • PBKDF2 key derivation
  • SOC 2 Type II certified
  • GDPR & CCPA compliant
  • Annual third-party audits

Simple Pricing

No hidden fees, cancel anytime

Individual

For personal use

$4.99 /month
  • Unlimited passwords
  • Tasks & notes
  • 2GB storage
Most Popular

Team

For teams & businesses

$9.99 /month
  • Everything in Individual
  • Up to 10 team members
  • 100GB storage
  • Audit logs

Enterprise

For large organizations

Custom
  • Everything in Team
  • Unlimited users
  • Dedicated support
  • Custom integrations

Keep Your Secrets Safe

Join thousands of teams protecting their sensitive data with TaskVault.

TaskVault

Secure task & password management
